name: stop: an opted-out guest with NO active booking gets no booking flow — only the opt-out pointer (B14/F24)
comment: Behaviour 3: with no active booking (mid-enquiry, AWAITING_ETA), the optional/enquiry flow is silenced — recordEta does NOT run, so no booking is confirmed and nothing about the booking is written or sent. The only reply is the terse opt-out status pointer. Zero booking writes is the proof the flow was suppressed.
